'''鈭歜-n-dh-m''' ('''kabandhemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:gypsy|gypsy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gypsy|gypsy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-n-dh-m
|-
! Lemma
| kabandhemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibandhemoko|thibandhemoko]] || [[word:jibandhemoko|jibandhemoko]] || [[word:shibandhemoko|shibandhemoko]] || [[word:kibandhemoko|kibandhemoko]]
